mapper.select:
SELECT g.gram_id, g.choice_id, g.user_id, g.product_id, g.title, g.content, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at, u.profile_img, u.nickname, pb.brand_name, e.name AS product_name, COUNT(gl.gram_id) AS like_count, MAX(CASE WHEN gl.user_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS liked, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grams_comment gc WHERE gc.gram_id = g.gram_id) AS comment_count FROM grams g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN gram_likes gl ON g.gram_id = gl.gram_id LEFT JOIN product_items e ON g.product_id = e.product_id LEFT JOIN product_brands pb ON e.brand_id = pb.brand_id
g.status = 'active'
AND g.product_id = #{productId}
AND (
REPLACE(g.title, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{searchKeyword}, ' ', ''), '%')
REPLACE(g.content, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{searchKeyword}, ' ', ''), '%')
REPLACE(u.nickname, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{searchKeyword}, ' ', ''), '%')
REPLACE(g.title, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{searchKeyword}, ' ', ''), '%')
)
GROUP BY g.gram_id, g.choice_id, g.user_id, g.product_id, g.title, g.content, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at, u.profile_img, u.nickname, pb.brand_name, e.name
ORDER BY g.title ASC, g.created_at DESC ORDER BY g.content ASC, g.created_at DESC ORDER BY u.nickname ASC, g.created_at DESC ORDER BY g.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grams (choice_id, user_id, product_id, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{choiceId}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{title}, #{content}, 'active', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grams WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT g.gram_id, g.choice_id, g.user_id, g.product_id, g.title, g.content, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at, u.profile_img, u.nickname, COUNT(gl.gram_id) AS like_count, MAX(CASE WHEN gl.user_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS liked FROM grams g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN gram_likes gl ON g.gram_id = gl.gram_id WHERE g.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY g.gram_id ORDER BY g.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT g.gram_id, g.choice_id, g.user_id, g.product_id, g.title, g.content, g.view_count, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at, g.view_count, u.profile_img, u.nickname FROM grams g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.user_id = u.user_id WHERE g.gram_id = #{gramNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE grams SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE gram_id = #{gramNo}
UPDATE grams SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE gram_id = #{gramId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gram_likes (user_id, gram_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gramId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'))
INSERT INTO gram_reports (user_id, gram_id, reason, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gramId}, #{reason}, 'pending', CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gram_reports WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND gram_id = #{gramId}

SELECT r.report_id, r.user_id, r.gram_id, g.title AS gramTitle, r.reason, r.status, g.created_at FROM gram_reports r LEFT JOIN grams g ON r.gram_id = g.gram_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.report_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gram_files (file_name, file_path, gram_id) VALUES (#{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{gramId})
mapper.select: SELECT product_id FROM choices WHERE choice_id = #{choiceId}

SELECT gc.grams_comment_no AS commentNo, gc.grams_comment_content AS content, gc.grams_comment_date AS createdAt, gc.gram_id AS gramId, gc.grams_comment_writer AS writerId, gc.parent_no AS parentNo, u.nickname AS writer, u.profile_img AS profileImg FROM grams_comment gc LEFT JOIN users u ON gc.grams_comment_writer = u.user_id WHERE gc.gram_id = #{gramId} ORDER BY gc.grams_comment_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grams_comment (grams_comment_content, grams_comment_date, gram_id, grams_comment_writer, parent_no) VALUES (#{content}, NOW(), #{gramId}, #{writerId}, #{parentNo})
mapper.select: SELECT c.user_id, c.is_selected, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM grams g WHERE g.choice_id = c.choice_id AND g.status != 'deleted' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS gram_written, c.expires_at FROM choices c WHERE c.choice_id = #{choiceId}
mapper.update: UPDATE choices SET gram_written = 1 WHERE choice_id = #{choiceId}
UPDATE grams SET status = 'expired' WHERE status = 'active' AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, created_at, NOW()) >= 168
UPDATE grams SET status = 'deleted' WHERE gram_id = #{gramId}
